content: The largest fruit in the world is the jackfruit, which can grow up to 80 pounds (36 kg) and reach around 3 feet (0.9 meters) long. In terms of vegetables, the largest is the giant pumpkin, with some record-breaking specimens weighing over 2,500 pounds (1,134 kg).
